steps.title: Follow the mechanism
steps.content: The text explains Cedar Mountain step by step: excess power pumps water to a summit lake during low demand, and the stored water later drains down to spin turbines and generate power during peak demand.

steps.title: Reject absent purposes
steps.content: A claims a comparison with another energy method, C claims the text urges utilities to build facilities, and D calls the technology new and benefit-focused. Those purposes are not present. The answer is B.
